notes: Passive - reads the 'script.modelExport' tag on a Flickr profile page (looks for 'Y.ClientApp.init(...)') and builds a draggable info modal with profile fields, photo/banner previews, and export buttons. No network calls of its own. If Flickr changes the modelExport structure this will fail with an alert instead of the modal.

checks.comment: Draggable modal header should appear once Flickr profile data is parsed
At least one strong element with extracted profile data (e.g. Display Name, NSID)
